Imogen Corvalen is the founder of Emberweave Systems. Imogen is exploring a pivot toward the enterprise segment.

---
title: Imogen Oakhurst

summary: Founder of Driftspark Works.

Imogen Oakhurst is the founder of Driftspark Works. Imogen wants a technical co-founder intro before committing.

turns.text: Ping Imogen about the offsite agenda.
Sorry — I meant Imogen Corvalen, the Emberweave Systems founder.
